name: Herbed Beef Patties
recipeIngredient: 1 d Each black pepper and paprika
1 tbsp Chopped fresh herbs such as
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine ground beef, cold water, garlic salt, dried oregano, black pepper, and paprika. Mix to blend well.
2. Divide the meat into even pieces. Shape each piece into a patty about 3/4 inch thick.
3. Coat patties with flour. Let sit for a few minutes.
4. Dip patties into beaten egg and then into bread crumbs.
5. Brown patties on both sides in butter in a skillet.
6. Arrange patties in a shallow baking dish. Pour a little spaghetti sauce over the patties.
7. Sprinkle with grated cheese. Pour the rest of the spaghetti sauce over the patties.
8. Bake at 400°F for about 25 minutes or until patties are hot and cheese has melted. Sprinkle with herbs and serve.
